title: Need Help Converting QuickBooks Desktop to Online: Facing Issues
excerpt: I recently tried converting QuickBooks Desktop to QuickBooks Online and ran into issues with missing data. Despite following the migration steps, some of my transactions and reports didn’t transfer correctly. Has anyone …

posts.author: RobertoWalker475 (Roberto)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently tried converting QuickBooks Desktop to QuickBooks Online and ran into issues with missing data. Despite following the migration steps, some of my transactions and reports didn’t transfer correctly. Has anyone else experienced this? Any advice or solutions from the community would be greatly appreciated!
